title: Courtroom Justice Exhibit Sidecar
description: Machine-readable projection of the dw-exhibit-manager ledger. The .xlsx remains the human/skill system of record; this JSON is read-only to the app. Frozen contract v1.0.

contract_version.description: Bump only on a breaking change. The app refuses a major version it does not recognize.

generated.description: ISO-8601 with offset; when this sidecar was written.

path_base.description: Declares that every exhibit.file path is relative to the directory containing THIS file (i.e., {CASE_ROOT}/Trial/). Frozen so the app never guesses.

id.description: e.g. D-001, S-014, J-002. Letter prefix + zero-padded number.

file.description: Path relative to the sidecar directory. Empty string allowed ONLY when status is pending and no file is staged yet.

objection.description: Free text of the objection logged, if any. Informational; not used for publish gating.

exhibit_number.description: Human-assigned exhibit number / sticker (e.g. D-1). Absent for unmarked imported documents.
